The '''Separatist Sub-Carrier''' was an underwater carrier vessel.

==Characteristics==
The Sub-Carrier could transport [[Mini-sub]]s [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by individual [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]]<ref name="CWC5" /> and autonomous [[manta droid subfighter]].<ref name="TCWCG" />

==History==
The mini-subs would exit through tubes located on the underside of the carrier. This was a dangerous maneuver, as [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|SCUBA troopers]] could ambush mini-subs on their way out, and there was no way of turning back once a sub was racing through the launch-tube.<ref name="CWC5" />

The Sub-Carrier resembled a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droid]] in shape, but dwarfed such craft in sheer size and volume. Each carrier was so big that entire skirmishes could be fought on the topside deck.<ref name="CWC5" />

The [[Xi Char]] provided the blueprints for the Sub-Carrier to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] free of charge for not being able to figure out how to make the manta droid subfighter transform like the vulture droid.<ref name="TNEGTD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Separatist Sub-Carrier somewhat resembles an unused [[Droideka/Legends|destroyer droid]] carrier for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], except it had four legs instead of two.
